description: Mobile or fixed POS with offline inventory sync and payment processing.
challenge: Retail locations with intermittent ISP suffer lost sales and inventory desynchronization. Mobile retail (food trucks, pop-up shops) often operate in dead zones.
response: VITO enables offline payment processing, caches product inventory locally, and reconciles sales when connectivity returns. Complete transaction audit trail for regulatory compliance.
result: Seamless sales regardless of connectivity, zero inventory desynchronization, and audit-ready transaction records.
